user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of orientation notification templates with their type, description and task, so that I can see which induction notifications are configured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list showing Notification type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the details of a specific notification template, so that I can review its content before it is sent
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I click View on a template row; Then the notification template details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the notification templates list, so that I always see the latest configured templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see the count of displayed notification templates, so that I know how many exist
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When the list is displayed; Then I see the displayed item range and total count

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel out of the Notification Templates screen, so that I can exit without making changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I click Cancel; Then I exit the screen without saving
